name: Bacon Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the white flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Add the corn-meal to the sifted ingredients.
3. In a separate bowl, beat the egg and mix with sweet milk and diced bacon.
4. Combine the wet ingredients with the dry ingredients until just mixed.
5. Fill prepared muffin tins 2/3 full with the batter.
6. Bake in a hot oven (450°F) for 15 minutes.
7. Continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until golden brown.
